title: CIA declassified assessments of the Soviet economy (CSI historical reviews + FOIA reading-room GNP estimates + JEC compendium)
source_org: Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) / US Joint Economic Committee (JEC)

failures.reason: CIA FOIA reading room /readingroom/docs/ and /readingroom/document/ paths return HTTP 302 redirect to https://www.cia.gov/readingroom for every request in this environment (including the bare /readingroom homepage itself), consistent with an Akamai bot-detection wall rather than a moved/removed document. Content was instead retrieved via the Wayback Machine snapshot (see files list) under a different filename.
jec.senate.gov returns HTTP 403 Access Denied (Akamai edge block) for direct curl fetch even with browser User-Agent/Referer headers. Retrieved instead via Wayback Machine snapshot.
Same Akamai redirect block as above AND no Wayback Machine snapshot available (checked via web.archive.org availability API) -- document could not be retrieved by any method attempted.

files.name: JEC-Measures-Soviet-GNP-1982-Prices.pdf
files.original_name: Measures of Soviet Gross National Product in 1982 Prices (1530).pdf
files.notes: 101st Congress Joint Economic Committee print (S. Prt. 101-123), 1990. Retrieved via Wayback Machine because jec.senate.gov blocks direct automated access (HTTP 403).

files.name: CIA-RDP92M00732R000300110001-2_MeasuresSovietGNP.pdf
files.notes: Declassified CIA FOIA reading-room document, 'Measures of Soviet Gross National Product'. Retrieved via Wayback Machine because cia.gov/readingroom blocks direct automated access (HTTP 302 loop).

files.name: DOC_0000498181_ComparisonSovietUSGNP.pdf
files.notes: Declassified CIA FOIA reading-room document, 'A Comparison of Soviet and US Gross National Product'. Retrieved via Wayback Machine because cia.gov/readingroom blocks direct automated access (HTTP 302 loop).

time_coverage: 1950s-1996 (documents published/declassified across this span; underlying GNP estimate series run roughly 1950-1990)
units: described within each document (mostly USD billions at various fixed prices, and index numbers)
notes: These are CIA/US-government reconstructions of Soviet GNP (Western dollar-cost methodology), NOT official Soviet statistics -- treat as a separate, methodologically distinct series from the 'narodnoe-khozyaistvo-yearbooks' dataset's official Soviet figures per docs/bookkeeping.md neutrality principles. CIA CSI static-resource PDFs (cia.gov/resources/csi/static/...) downloaded directly with no issues. The cia.gov/readingroom/ FOIA reading room and jec.senate.gov both blocked direct automated retrieval (Akamai bot-detection redirect/403) in this environment; 2 of 3 additional JEC/GNP-estimate documents were still obtained via Wayback Machine snapshots. One document (CIA-RDP85T01058R000507850001-1, 'Soviet Statistical Falsification') could not be retrieved by any method.
